hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push' || exit 0; cd /Users/pashesh/Desktop/Code/hackathon/Code-modernization-hackathon/Modernized/tests/node && npm install --silent 2>/dev/null && npm test 2>&1; code=$?; [ $code -eq 0 ] && echo '{}' || echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Tests in Modernized/tests/node failed. Fix failing tests before pushing."}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ "$(basename "$f")" != "CLAUDE.md" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CLAUDE.md sync reminder: You just modified a file. If this change affects any of the following, update CLAUDE.md at spring-music/CLAUDE.md: (1) architecture or package structure, (2) coding conventions or naming rules, (3) technology stack, (4) user stories US-1/US-2/US-3 or their acceptance criteria, (5) known design decisions or gotchas table, (6) test file locations or testing patterns."}}'; } 2>/dev/null || true
